joke: Why did the scarecrow win an award? He was outstanding in his field!
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole in one!
Why did the bicycle fall over? It was two-tired!
Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts!
Why did the belt get arrested? For holding up the pants!
Why did the cookie go to the doctor? Because it felt crummy!
Why did the man throw the clock out the window? He wanted to see time fly!
Why did the student take a ladder to school? Because he wanted to go to high school!
Why don't ghosts ever tell lies? Because you can see right through them!
Why did the man run around his bed? He wanted to catch up on his sleep!
Why did the picture go to jail? Because it was framed!
Why was 6 afraid of 7? Because 7 8 9!
Why did the house go to the doctor? Because it had a window pain!
Why don't elephants like to play cards in the jungle? Because there are too many cheetahs!
Why did the tree go to the dentist? Because it needed a root canal!
Why did the football coach go to the bank? To get his quarter back!
Why was the musician arrested? Because he was in treble!
Why can't you trust stairs? They're always up to something!
Why was the cell phone wearing glasses? Because it lost its contacts!
Why did the man leave his job at the bank? He lost interest!
What did the ocean say to the beach? Nothing, it just waved!
Why did the computer go to the doctor? Because it had a virus!
Why did the coffee file a police report? It got mugged!
Why did the astronaut break up with his girlfriend? He needed space!
Why was the broom late? It overswept!
Why are libraries so tall? Because they have so many stories!
Why did the cloud go to the doctor? Because it was feeling under the weather!
Why did the train go to the doctor? Because it had a loco-motive!
Why couldn't the pirate play cards? Because he was sitting on the deck!
